---
title: Physics Concepts as Indicative Framework to Model Systems of Economies Ex-ante

# draft: true 

subtitle: Coincise Notes and Conjectures Explorations of Natural Laws as Approach to Preliminarly Structure Economies - A Distillation of Corroboration of Mathematical Models

author:
  - name: Eugenio Net
    email: eugenionetweb@gmail.com
    # affiliation:
    #   name: eugenionet.github.io
    #   url: www.eugenionet.github.io/potentials

date: today

keywords:
  - Physics
  - Energy
  - Potential

copyright: 
  holder: Author
  year: 2026

license: "CC BY"

bibliography: references.bib  
csl: diabetologia.csl

nocite: |
  @*  


# https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/front-matter.html#abstract
abstract: |
    An exploratory attempt ...
    Interconnection network between movement, force, momentum, energy, and work.
    Describing systems with Lagrangian and Hamltonian when constraints and starting conditions exist.
    Modeling systems and optimisation with constraints and conditions.
    Interwoven system of macro- and microeconomie under constraints, limitations, and conditions.

---



---


\
\
<p style="text-align: center; color: slategray;">
*WORKING NOTES DRAFT* <br>
</p>
\
\




# POTENTIALS {#sec-potential}

{{< include C:/Users/erine/Desktop/Physics-Explorations/GitHub-Physics/Potentials/Potentials.qmd >}}
\
\
